satire_attempt: The Equanimity Engineer arrives at the dashboard each morning identical, regardless of metric. Identical when the launch hits target. Identical when the competitor ships first. Identical when the building catches fire. Identical at funerals. Identical, identical, identical, until the engineer is a kind of well-shaped granite. Subscribe to my newsletter Geological Engineering: How To Become Stone By Lunchtime.
verdict_reason: The satire attempts to mock equanimity-as-affect-erasure, but the engineering layer specifically guards against this. The falsifiability explicitly rejects stoic suppression ('equanimity-with-care is not stoic suppression; it is reading the data accurately while not letting the data rewrite the reader's identity'). The counter-example explicitly handles signals that SHOULD change the engineer's relationship to the work (missed target reveals wrong product, dashboard regression reveals system broken). The voice does not become granite; it remains specific (8 a.m., 11 a.m., 2 p.m., specific role types). The satire bounces off.
